lines.gurmukhi: ਸੂਹੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: soohee mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Soohee, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਾਂਡਾ ਅਤਿ ਮਲੀਣੁ ਧੋਤਾ ਹਛਾ ਨ ਹੋਇਸੀ ॥
lines.translit: bhaanddaa at maleen dhotaa hachhaa na hoeisee |
lines.english: The filthiest vessel does not become pure, simply by being washed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਾਂਡਾ ਹਛਾ ਸੋਇ ਜੋ ਤਿਸੁ ਭਾਵਸੀ ॥
lines.translit: bhaanddaa hachhaa soe jo tis bhaavasee |
lines.english: That vessel alone is pure, which is pleasing to Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰੂ ਦੁਆਰੈ ਹੋਇ ਸੋਝੀ ਪਾਇਸੀ ॥
lines.translit: guroo duaarai hoe sojhee paaeisee |
lines.english: Through the Gurdwara, the Guru's Gate, one obtains understanding.

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਤੁ ਦੁਆਰੈ ਧੋਇ ਹਛਾ ਹੋਇਸੀ ॥
lines.translit: et duaarai dhoe hachhaa hoeisee |
lines.english: By being washed through this Gate, it becomes pure.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੈਲੇ ਹਛੇ ਕਾ ਵੀਚਾਰੁ ਆਪਿ ਵਰਤਾਇਸੀ ॥
lines.translit: maile hachhe kaa veechaar aap varataaeisee |
lines.english: The Lord Himself sets the standards to differentiate between the dirty and the pure.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਤੁ ਕੋ ਜਾਣੈ ਜਾਇ ਅਗੈ ਪਾਇਸੀ ॥
lines.translit: mat ko jaanai jaae agai paaeisee |
lines.english: Do not think that you will automatically find a place of rest hereafter.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇਹੇ ਕਰਮ ਕਮਾਇ ਤੇਹਾ ਹੋਇਸੀ ॥
lines.translit: jehe karam kamaae tehaa hoeisee |
lines.english: According to the actions one has committed, so does the mortal become.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਹਰਿ ਕਾ ਨਾਉ ਆਪਿ ਵਰਤਾਇਸੀ ॥
lines.translit: amrit har kaa naau aap varataaeisee |
lines.english: He Himself bestows the Ambrosial Name of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਣਸੁ ਕਿਆ ਵੇਚਾਰਾ ਤਿਹੁ ਲੋਕ ਸੁਣਾਇਸੀ ॥
lines.translit: maanas kiaa vechaaraa tihu lok sunaaeisee |
lines.english: Why speak of poor mortals? His glory shall echo throughout the three worlds.

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਲਿਆ ਪਤਿ ਸਿਉ ਜਨਮੁ ਸਵਾਰਿ ਵਾਜਾ ਵਾਇਸੀ ॥
lines.translit: chaliaa pat siau janam savaar vaajaa vaaeisee |
lines.english: Such a mortal departs with honor and renown; his life is embellished and redeemed, and the trumpets resound with his glory.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋਗੀ ਹੋਵੈ ਜੋਗਵੈ ਭੋਗੀ ਹੋਵੈ ਖਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: jogee hovai jogavai bhogee hovai khaae |
lines.english: The Yogi practices yoga, and the pleasure-seeker practices eating.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੂਹੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: soohee mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Soohee, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਆਪਿ ਨਿਹਾਲ ਸਭਿ ਕੁਲ ਤਾਰਸੀ ॥੧॥੪॥੬॥
lines.translit: naanak aap nihaal sabh kul taarasee |1|4|6|
lines.english: O Nanak, he himself shall be enraptured, and he shall save his entire ancestry. ||1||4||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੇਰਾ ਸਦੜਾ ਸੁਣੀਜੈ ਭਾਈ ਜੇ ਕੋ ਬਹੈ ਅਲਾਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: teraa sadarraa suneejai bhaaee je ko bahai alaae |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Let me hear some news of You, O Beloved; if only someone would come and sit with me, and tell me. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਪੀਆ ਹੋਵੈ ਤਪੁ ਕਰੇ ਤੀਰਥਿ ਮਲਿ ਮਲਿ ਨਾਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: tapeea hovai tap kare teerath mal mal naae |1|
lines.english: The austere practice austerities, bathing and rubbing themselves at sacred shrines of pilgrimage. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੈਸਾ ਬੀਜੈ ਸੋ ਲੁਣੇ ਜੋ ਖਟੇ ਸੋੁ ਖਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: jaisaa beejai so lune jo khatte so khaae |
lines.english: As one plants, so does he harvest; whatever he earns, he eats.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਗੈ ਪੁਛ ਨ ਹੋਵਈ ਜੇ ਸਣੁ ਨੀਸਾਣੈ ਜਾਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: agai puchh na hovee je san neesaanai jaae |2|
lines.english: In the world hereafter, his account is not called for, if he goes with the insignia of the Lord. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹੁ ਤਨੁ ਵੇਚੀ ਬੈ ਕਰੀ ਜੇ ਕੋ ਲਏ ਵਿਕਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: eihu tan vechee bai karee je ko le vikaae |
lines.english: I would sell this body, if someone would only purchase it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੈਸੋ ਜੈਸਾ ਕਾਢੀਐ ਜੈਸੀ ਕਾਰ ਕਮਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: taiso jaisaa kaadteeai jaisee kaar kamaae |
lines.english: According to the actions the mortal commits, so is he proclaimed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਦਮੁ ਚਿਤਿ ਨ ਆਵਈ ਸੋ ਦਮੁ ਬਿਰਥਾ ਜਾਇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: jo dam chit na aavee so dam birathaa jaae |3|
lines.english: And that breath which is drawn without thinking of the Lord, that breath goes in vain. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਕੰਮਿ ਨ ਆਵਈ ਜਿਤੁ ਤਨਿ ਨਾਹੀ ਸਚਾ ਨਾਉ ॥੪॥੫॥੭॥
lines.translit: naanak kam na aavee jit tan naahee sachaa naau |4|5|7|
lines.english: O Nanak, that body is of no use at all, if it does not enshrine the Name of the True Lord. ||4||5||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੂਹੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ਘਰੁ ੭ ॥
lines.translit: soohee mahalaa 1 ghar 7 |
lines.english: Soohee, First Mehl, Seventh House:

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋਗੁ ਨ ਖਿੰਥਾ ਜੋਗੁ ਨ ਡੰਡੈ ਜੋਗੁ ਨ ਭਸਮ ਚੜਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: jog na khinthaa jog na ddanddai jog na bhasam charraaeeai |
lines.english: Yoga is not the patched coat, Yoga is not the walking stick. Yoga is not smearing the body with ashes.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋਗੁ ਨ ਮੁੰਦੀ ਮੂੰਡਿ ਮੁਡਾਇਐ ਜੋਗੁ ਨ ਸਿੰਙੀ ਵਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: jog na mundee moondd muddaaeiai jog na singee vaaeeai |
lines.english: Yoga is not the ear-rings, and not the shaven head. Yoga is not the blowing of the horn.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਜਨ ਮਾਹਿ ਨਿਰੰਜਨਿ ਰਹੀਐ ਜੋਗ ਜੁਗਤਿ ਇਵ ਪਾਈਐ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: anjan maeh niranjan raheeai jog jugat iv paaeeai |1|
lines.english: Remaining unblemished in the midst of the filth of the world - this is the way to attain Yoga. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਲੀ ਜੋਗੁ ਨ ਹੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: galee jog na hoee |
lines.english: By mere words, Yoga is not attained.

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਕ ਦ੍ਰਿਸਟਿ ਕਰਿ ਸਮਸਰਿ ਜਾਣੈ ਜੋਗੀ ਕਹੀਐ ਸੋਈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: ek drisatt kar samasar jaanai jogee kaheeai soee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: One who looks upon all with a single eye, and knows them to be one and the same - he alone is known as a Yogi. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋਗੁ ਨ ਬਾਹਰਿ ਮੜੀ ਮਸਾਣੀ ਜੋਗੁ ਨ ਤਾੜੀ ਲਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: jog na baahar marree masaanee jog na taarree laaeeai |
lines.english: Yoga is not wandering to the tombs of the dead; Yoga is not sitting in trances.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਜਨ ਮਾਹਿ ਨਿਰੰਜਨਿ ਰਹੀਐ ਜੋਗ ਜੁਗਤਿ ਇਵ ਪਾਈਐ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: anjan maeh niranjan raheeai jog jugat iv paaeeai |2|
lines.english: Remaining unblemished in the midst of the filth of the world - this is the way to attain Yoga. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋਗੁ ਨ ਦੇਸਿ ਦਿਸੰਤਰਿ ਭਵਿਐ ਜੋਗੁ ਨ ਤੀਰਥਿ ਨਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: jog na des disantar bhaviai jog na teerath naaeeai |
lines.english: Yoga is not wandering through foreign lands; Yoga is not bathing at sacred shrines of pilgrimage.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਭੇਟੈ ਤਾ ਸਹਸਾ ਤੂਟੈ ਧਾਵਤੁ ਵਰਜਿ ਰਹਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: satigur bhettai taa sahasaa toottai dhaavat varaj rahaaeeai |
lines.english: Meeting with the True Guru, doubt is dispelled, and the wandering mind is restrained.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਝਰੁ ਝਰੈ ਸਹਜ ਧੁਨਿ ਲਾਗੈ ਘਰ ਹੀ ਪਰਚਾ ਪਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: nijhar jharai sehaj dhun laagai ghar hee parachaa paaeeai |
lines.english: Nectar rains down, celestial music resounds, and deep within, wisdom is obtained.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਜਨ ਮਾਹਿ ਨਿਰੰਜਨਿ ਰਹੀਐ ਜੋਗ ਜੁਗਤਿ ਇਵ ਪਾਈਐ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: anjan maeh niranjan raheeai jog jugat iv paaeeai |3|
lines.english: Remaining unblemished in the midst of the filth of the world - this is the way to attain Yoga. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਾਜੇ ਬਾਝਹੁ ਸਿੰਙੀ ਵਾਜੈ ਤਉ ਨਿਰਭਉ ਪਦੁ ਪਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: vaaje baajhahu singee vaajai tau nirbhau pad paaeeai |
lines.english: When the horn is blown without being blown, then you shall attain the state of fearless dignity.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਜੀਵਤਿਆ ਮਰਿ ਰਹੀਐ ਐਸਾ ਜੋਗੁ ਕਮਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: naanak jeevatiaa mar raheeai aisaa jog kamaaeeai |
lines.english: O Nanak, remain dead while yet alive - practice such a Yoga.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਉਣ ਤਰਾਜੀ ਕਵਣੁ ਤੁਲਾ ਤੇਰਾ ਕਵਣੁ ਸਰਾਫੁ ਬੁਲਾਵਾ ॥
lines.translit: kaun taraajee kavan tulaa teraa kavan saraaf bulaavaa |
lines.english: What scale, what weights, and what assayer shall I call for You, Lord?

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਜਨ ਮਾਹਿ ਨਿਰੰਜਨਿ ਰਹੀਐ ਜੋਗ ਜੁਗਤਿ ਤਉ ਪਾਈਐ ॥੪॥੧॥੮॥
lines.translit: anjan maeh niranjan raheeai jog jugat tau paaeeai |4|1|8|
lines.english: Remaining unblemished in the midst of the filth of the world - this is the way to attain Yoga. ||4||1||8||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੂਹੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: soohee mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Soohee, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਉਣੁ ਗੁਰੂ ਕੈ ਪਹਿ ਦੀਖਿਆ ਲੇਵਾ ਕੈ ਪਹਿ ਮੁਲੁ ਕਰਾਵਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: kaun guroo kai peh deekhiaa levaa kai peh mul karaavaa |1|
lines.english: From what guru should I receive instruction? By whom should I have Your value appraised? ||1||
